description: Payment claim for rebar fixing to grid C–F carried out in February 2026 under our subcontract with BigBuild Main Contractor Ltd (main contract ~HK$8,000,000). Reference date 28 Feb 2026. We claim HK$1,250,000.00 per the attached invoice and site diary. The claim was served by hand on BigBuild on 2 Mar 2026; we kept the signed delivery receipt. BigBuild served a payment response the same day.
